site.title: Ashel
site.subtitle: Guitarist | Producer | Multi-Project Artist from Mexico City
bio: Multi-instrumentalist, guitarist, and producer from Mexico City. Active across multiple projects spanning blackgaze, post-rock, math rock, screamo, thrash metal, and ambient music.
Handles production, mixing, mastering, and design across most projects, recording at home studios and Echo Bravo Studio.

projects.name: Oshira
projects.shortDescription: Dark screamo duo with Manuel Espinoza. Debut EP "Vorágine" mastered by Brad Boatright. For fans of Portrayal of Guilt, Respire, Saetia.
description: Dark screamo duo exploring the tension between identity, fear, and the pressure we place on ourselves in the face of uncertainty. The feeling of "not arriving on time to your own life," oscillating between disappearing and asserting your existence, searching for clarity within the chaos. For fans of Portrayal of Guilt, Ostraca, Saetia, Respire, Infant Island, Lightning Bolt, Hella, and The Body.
"Vorágine" was recorded and mixed by the duo, with mastering by Brad Boatright and cover art by Ethan Lee McCarthy.

projects.name: Dotzd
projects.shortDescription: Post-(Rock/Metal) (Shoe/Black)-gaze one man band. 8 releases since 2012 spanning blackgaze, shoegaze, slowcore, ambient, and psychedelic.
description: Ashel's solo project where blackgaze, post-rock, and shoegaze merge into soundscapes ranging from serene introspection to walls of distortion. Eight releases since 2012 exploring duality — day and night, change and the eternal.

The sound spans blackgaze, shoegaze, slowcore, psychedelia, ambient, and noise — whatever it takes to express the feeling of duality that is a constant in life. "Tempo" was produced at Echo Bravo Studio. "Empero" features Carlo Ixcamparij on drums, marking the first collaboration on a Dotzd release.

releases.name: Empero
releases.description: "Empero" represents a long-awaited release forged through a complicated journey and numerous revisions. Written and recorded during 2020, the album features Carlo Ixcamparij on drums — a first for Dotzd.

releases.name: Tempo
releases.description: Produced at Echo Bravo Studio, Tempo explores the passage of time through layered guitar textures and hypnotic rhythms.

projects.name: Recuerdos de un Sueño Perdido
projects.shortDescription: Math rock con huevos. 4-piece band with Mauricio Narváez, Ivan Luna "Chapu", and Arturo Macías. Formed in mid-2017.
description: Formed in mid-2017, this 4-piece band blends math rock, emo, and screamo with raw energy. Their only release "Valle Bravo" features 6 tracks — each named after failed attempts at the band name. Recorded entirely by the band at El Cuarto de Ensayo in December 2017, with mixing, production, and design by Ashel.

projects.name: Ashel (Solo)
projects.shortDescription: Personal solo project for ambient experiments, post-rock compositions, math rock, and covers. Plus guitar improvisations on YouTube.
description: Personal solo project for ambient experiments, post-rock compositions, math rock, and covers. A space to explore sounds outside the confines of other projects — from ambient experiments and Delta Sleep covers to a Metallica "ONE" ambient/post-rock reimagining. Also includes guitar improvisations shared on YouTube.

projects.name: Hostem
projects.shortDescription: Thrash/hardcore band from Tlalnepantla. Self-titled debut EP with 4 tracks. Raziel, Sebastián, Diego, Alec, and Ashel.
description: Thrash/hardcore band from Tlalnepantla. Raw, unrelenting energy with 4 tracks covering themes from social critique to dark fantasy. Self-titled debut EP recorded at Diego's house, mixed by Ashel. Lyrics by Diego and Raziel, with special thanks to Aldo "Hacha Loca" López.
